news.headline: Hundreds flee as fire rips through German nightclub
news.summary:
Hundreds of people were evacuated from a nightclub in southwest Germany after a fire broke out, police said on Sunday, with images from the scene showing the blaze raging on the building’s roof.
Police said the fire began at around 3.45am in the nightclub in Kehl, which is on the border with France.

news.headline: France foils bomb attack outside Bank of America in Paris
news.summary: French police on Saturday stopped an apparent bomb attack outside a Bank of America branch in Paris. The French counter-terrorism prosecutor's office said it was investigating a "terrorist criminal conspiracy". Nicholas Rushworth and our colleagues from FRANCE 2 report.

news.headline: China biotech deals hit record as innovative drugs draw interest of multinationals
